accountNotFound.title: Account Not Found
accountNotFound.description: We couldn't find your account in our records. To access Glomi AI, you need to either:
accountNotFound.invite: Be invited to an existing Glomi AI team
accountNotFound.createTeam: Create a new Glomi AI team
accountNotFound.differentEmail: Have an account with a different email?

error.title: Authentication Error
error.description: There was a problem with your login attempt.
error.contactSupportCloud: If you continue to experience problems, please reach out to the Glomi AI team at
error.contactSupportSelfHosted: If you continue to experience problems, please reach out to your system administrator for assistance.
error.accessDenied: Access was denied by your identity provider.
error.loginRequired: You need to log in with your identity provider first.
error.consentRequired: Your identity provider requires consent before continuing.
error.interactionRequired: Additional interaction with your identity provider is required.
error.invalidScope: The requested permissions are not available.
error.serverError: Your identity provider encountered an error. Please try again.
error.temporarilyUnavailable: Your identity provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

sidebar.emptyRecents: Try sending a message! Your chat history will appear here.

input.placeholder: How can I help you today?
input.queuedPlaceholder: Press up to edit queued messages
input.deepResearchDisabled: Deep Research is disabled in multi-model mode
input.voiceNotConfigured: Voice not configured. Set up in admin settings.

header.deleteChatDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.
header.deleteChatFailed: Failed to delete chat. Please try again.

chatActions.deleteChatDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.
chatActions.deleteChatFailed: Failed to delete chat. Please try again.
chatActions.createProjectFailed: Failed to create project. Please try again.

agents.defaultModelDescription: Glomi AI will use this model by default in your chats.
agents.knowledgeCutoffDescription: Documents with a last-updated date prior to this will be ignored.
agents.overwriteSystemPromptsDescription: Remove the base system prompt which includes useful instructions (e.g. "You can use Markdown tables"). This may affect response quality.

appPopup.consentRequired: You need to agree to the terms to access the application.

memories.title: Memory
memories.description: Let Glomi AI reference these stored notes and memories in chats.
memories.placeholder: Type or paste in a personal note or memory
memories.empty: No memories yet. Click "Add Line" to get started.
